---
title: "Elizabeth Anna Hart"
---

## Elizabeth Anna Hart

**Dates:** (1822-1890)

**Maiden name:** (Smedley)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>, novelist and children’s writer

### Biography

Sister of the writer Menella Bute Smedley, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874-6)

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
